info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: BujedBunakti BuNkte syuH kOwilye pAlanedane ' (Slo.65) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'prAYca vE trayastriMSo yajYaM praBujati' (paYca0 brA0 2024) prakarzeRa kuwilaM karotItyarTaH prAYcam fjutvena gacCantam
'ekI kftastvaci nizikta ivAvapIqya nirBugnapInakucakuqmalayA'nayA me' (mAlatI0 612) nirBugne vakrIkfte kucakuNmale yasyAstayA
'Bujo'navane anavanakOwilyayoriti vaktavyam ihApi yaTA syAt--nirBujati jAnuSirasI' (pA0 1366 sUtre BAzye)
'niBujati jAnuSirasI' (pratimAyAH) (pA0 1266 sUtre BAzye) niBujati kuwilI karoti vakrayati niSabdo DAtvarTAnuvAdI
'kimanenAtiBugnena vAgBiH kAzWasaDarmaRA' (BA0 Salya0 6122)  Bugnena rugRena tunnena
